orb_question: What can I help you with?
orb_placeholder: I want to explore Kraków for 2 days...
chip_sightseeing_query: What are the top sights to see?
greeting_with_name: Hey {{name}}, what are we doing today?
greeting: Hey, what are we doing today?

landing.description: You talk — AI plans. You travel — AI remembers.
landing.feature1_desc: Just enter the city and days — AI will build a route with specific places, times and distances.
landing.feature2_desc: Back at the hotel, tell us how the day went — AI will ask, listen and save your memories.
landing.feature3_desc: With every trip TRASA learns what you avoid and love — the next plan will be even better.

empty_active: No active routes. Plan your trip!
delete_trip_desc: Are you sure you want to delete the trip "{{city}}"? All routes and pins will be permanently removed.
